title: Agent workflows got even faster. You can spin up containers for skills, shell and code interpreter about 10x faster. We added a container pool to the Responses API, so requests can reuse warm infrastructure instead of creating a full container creation each session. https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/tools-shell#hosted-shell-quickstart
